segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Ann Stirling did not think of the risk she was taking when she ran through a forest after two men.

translations.zh-Hans: 斯特林太太追着两个男人跑进森林时，根本没想到自己所冒的风险。

segments.text: They had rushed up to her while she was having a picnic at the edge of a forest with her children.

translations.zh-Hans: 当时她正和孩子们在森林边缘野餐，那两个人突然冲到她面前。

segments.text: Stirling got so angry that she ran after them.

translations.zh-Hans: 太太气愤极了，便追了上去。

segments.text: She was soon out of breath, but she continued to run.

translations.zh-Hans: 她很快就上气不接下气，但仍继续追赶。

segments.text: When she caught up with them, she saw that they had sat down and were going through the contents of the bag, so she ran straight at them.

translations.zh-Hans: 追上他们时，她看到两人已经坐下，正在翻看包里的东西，于是径直朝他们冲过去。

segments.text: The men got such a fright that they dropped the bag and ran away.

translations.zh-Hans: 那两个人吓得扔下提包逃走了。

segments.text: The strap needs mending, said Mrs.

translations.zh-Hans: “包带需要修一修，”斯特林太太

segments.text: Stirling later, but they did not steal anything.

translations.zh-Hans: 后来又说，“不过他们什么也没偷走。”
